Some analysts find Nvidia stock undervalued, yet it continues to decline.
ArcelorMittal reveals 2024 financial results for parent company.
Company buys back 5,000 of its shares, now holding a total of 1 million shares, with voting rights reduced to 999,500.

Putin: Russia to ship 70 mln-100 mln tons via Arctic route by 2030
Kering and Ardian finalize major investment deal, undisclosed amount involved.
AHIP to release Q4 2024 financial results on March 31, 2025. Conference call on April 1, 2025 at 10:00 a.m. PT. Executives to discuss results.
news.summary: American Hotel Income Properties REIT LP, known as AHIP, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, will disclose its financial performance for the quarter concluded on December 31, 2024, post-market closure on Monday, March 31, 2025. For those interested, the Q4 2024 results conference call is scheduled for Tuesday, April 1, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Pacific Time. The call will involve Company leaders presenting and delving into AHIP's financial outcomes while addressing inquiries from analysts. The Company's trading symbols are TSX: HOT.UN, TSX: HOT.U, TSX: HOT.DB.V.

news.headline: Putin: Russia is ready to cooperate in Arctic with friendly states.
Operating profitability increased in 2024 for Cegedim, with significant results.
news.summary: The latest report reveals that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3%, the lowest it has been in five years. In addition, the economy added 200,000 new jobs in the past month, showing a positive trend in the labor market. This decrease in unemployment is attributed to various factors, including increased consumer spending and growth in the manufacturing sector. The job market is expected to continue improving in the coming months, providing opportunities for those seeking employment. Overall, the data reflects a strengthening economy and a hopeful outlook for job seekers.

news.headline: Comerica Bank's Shred Day on April 12 in DFW includes donations to North Texas Food Bank.
news.summary: As guests drive through the shred lanes, they are encouraged to donate food or money to the North Texas Food Bank. In Dallas on March 27, 2025, Comerica Bank and Iron Mountain Incorporated are partnering to provide shredding services. The initiative aims to support the community, with a specific focus on aiding the North Texas Food Bank. This partnership signifies a collaborative effort to assist those in need.

news.headline: Fluxys Belgium reports annual results for 2024, as per regulatory requirements.
Transgene hits major milestones in 2024, with successful clinical proof for personalized cancer vaccine, promising 2025.
Fluxys Belgium discloses 2024 annual results through regulated information.
Fed bids for 7-Yr notes total $1.3 bln
Putin: There is the possibility for cooperation in the Arctic, including with western states.
Adyen Giving passes $25M mark with donations from shoppers globally. Goal set to raise more than €100M by 2030.
news.summary: Adyen has pledged to match all donations made through its Adyen Giving product throughout the year 2025. The company has announced an ambitious fundraising goal of over €100 million (approximately 108 million USD) for Giving by the year 2030. This commitment was revealed in an event held in Amsterdam and San Francisco on March 27, 2025.

news.headline: Elizabeth Warren criticizes SEC Chair nominee for alleged crypto 'pre-bribe,' citing concerns over stablecoin legislation.
news.summary: The senator, well-known for being skeptical about cryptocurrencies, has expressed worries about potential conflicts of interest related to legislation regarding stablecoins.

news.headline: InventHelp inventor from New York develops the MBQ-628, a closed-circuit radio communication system for enhanced security.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 27, 2025, an inventor from New York City shared details about a new innovation aimed at addressing the issue of an incomplete closed circuit radio communication (CCRC) system. The inventor expressed confidence in finding a simple solution for this problem through the CCRC. This new design is intended to bolster security measures. The invention has drawn attention due to its potential impact on communication systems, and has created buzz within the innovation community.

news.headline: Rep. Tom Emmer opposes Wyoming's state-issued CBDC, calling it a disguised effort to tokenize currency.
news.summary: The Majority Whip for the GOP declared strong opposition to the project, stating disagreement with any state - whether Republican-led or not - issuing a tokenized form of its currency.

news.headline: Putin: We are concerned that nato sees the north as the possible foothold for conflicts.
Putin: Russia has never threatened anyone in the Arctic, but we are closely watching the situation. We will defend our interests.
Putin: The US is serious about Greenland. The US will promote its interests in Arctic.
NUS physicists find groundbreaking copper-free superconducting oxide capable of operating at high temperatures.
news.summary: In Singapore on March 27, 2025, Professor Ariando and Dr. Stephen Lin Er Chow from the Department of Physics at National University of Singapore (NUS) introduced a revolutionary new material. This copper-free superconducting oxide has the exceptional ability to superconduct at high temperatures.

news.headline: EFG enhances leadership team with Anthony Olivieri as Director of Training Services and Billy Champion for Powersports team to boost revenue growth.
news.summary: In Dallas, a recent announcement from EFG Companies revealed the promotion of Anthony Olivieri to Director of Training Services within the auto dealers sector. Concurrently, Billy Champion has joined the Powersports team to bolster client profitability. Olivieri's elevation and Champion's appointment are expected to enhance training services and support for clients.

news.headline: Putin: Geopolitical rivalry has heated up in the Arctic.
Putin: The US has longed eyed Greenland.
Global Virtual Try-On market valued at US$12.5 billion in 2024, projected to reach US$48.8 billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 25.5%.
news.summary: In Dublin, the Global Strategic Business Report on Virtual Try-On has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market for Virtual Try-On was valued at US$12.5 billion in 2024 and is estimated to grow to US$48.8 billion by 2030, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 25.5% during 2024-2030. The report offers valuable insights into market trends, driving factors, and projections to assist in making informed business choices. The increasing popularity of virtual try-on solutions is a notable trend highlighted in the report.

news.headline: Proxet adds two tech industry veterans to leadership team in 2025 for custom software development, digital transformation.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in BROOKLINE, Massachusetts, an announcement was made by Proxet, a worldwide firm offering custom software development and digital transformation services, about the enhancement of its leadership team. Two experienced professionals from the tech industry have joined the team. Dmitriy Bibikov has been appointed to lead Proxet, bringing valuable expertise to the company. This move signifies a significant step towards strengthening Proxet's position in the industry.

news.headline: Duncan resigns from Postal Service Board due to health reasons, effective immediately.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, Robert M. "Mike" Duncan, a Governor of the United States Postal Service, disclosed his resignation from the board of governors citing health concerns. Effective immediately, his departure leaves a vacant spot on the board. Duncan's decision comes after serving for an undisclosed period.

news.headline: Playa Bowls celebrates National Acai Day on April 6 with $5 off for Loyalty Members in Belmar, NJ.
news.summary: A popular acai bowl shop based in New Jersey, known as the Original Acai Bowl Shop™, is extending an invitation to its Playa Rewards® Loyalty Members to participate in the National Acai Day festivities. The shop, Playa Bowls, located in BELMAR, N.J., is commemorating the occasion on March 27, 2025. Members of the Playa Rewards® program will have the opportunity to receive a $5 discount on any acai-related purchase as part of the celebration. Playa Bowls is recognized as a leading superfruit shop nationwide.

news.headline: Cleerly to present AI-QCT study on cardiovascular risk in women at ACC.25, Chicago, March 29-31, 2025.
news.summary: Cleerly, a top provider of cardiovascular AI imaging, will be presenting at the ACC.25 event on March 29-31, 2025, in Chicago, Illinois. The company will reveal new insights on the effectiveness of Artificial Intelligence-based Quantitative Computed Tomography (AI-QCT) in predicting future major adverse cardiovascular events (MACE) in women. Catch Cleerly at McCormick Place Convention Center to learn more about their groundbreaking research.

news.headline: American Rebel plans to extend sponsorship for 2025 with Tony Stewart Racing (TSR) in NHRA Mission Foods Drag Racing Series.
SBCA releases BCSI-2025 guide for building components safety, providing users with updated information.
news.summary: Irving, TX - The latest version of the Building Component Safety Information (BCSI) Guide, BCSI-2025, has been unveiled by the Structural Building Components Association (SBCA). This updated guide aims to enhance safety measures for construction projects and offer valuable insights to users. Released on March 27, 2025, the BCSI-2025 guide presents significant advancements in building component safety. This up-to-date edition contains crucial information and guidelines crucial for industry professionals. The SBCA is thrilled to introduce this comprehensive resource to support stakeholders in the construction sector.

news.headline: Sanoma Corp buys own shares on March 27, 2025.
WithSecure Corp: Announcement - Share Buyback on 27.3.2025.
2025 AGM materials now accessible by ASM.
Acorn to present at Planet MicroCap Showcase in Las Vegas on April 23rd at 11am PT.
news.summary: Acorn, a company specializing in monitoring and controlling backup power generators, will be presenting at the Planet MicroCap Showcase in Las Vegas on Wednesday, April 23rd at 11am PT. This event will introduce Acorn's services to potential investors and industry stakeholders.

news.headline: Global drone-powered business solutions market valued at $17.9 billion in 2024, projected to reach $47.5 billion by 2030 with a 17.6% CAGR growth. Expanding focus on autonomous UAV interception drives opportunities in defense.
news.summary: Dublin - The report titled "Drone-Powered Business Solutions - Global Strategic Business Report" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global market for Drone-Powered Business Solutions had a value of US$17.9 Billion in 2024 and is estimated to reach US$47.5 Billion by 2030, with a projected growth rate of 17.6% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers insights into market trends, drivers, and future forecasts to assist in making strategic business decisions related to drone technologies.

news.headline: Marit Health launches platform for salary transparency in medicine, secures $3.2M seed round, aiming to provide detailed insights on earnings for clinicians.
news.summary: Designed specifically for doctors and Advanced Practice Providers (APPs), Marit provides verified salary information anonymously. This includes detailed data on salaries, bonuses, benefits, shifts, and more, aiming to offer clinicians unprecedented transparency. The platform presents users with a never-before-seen level of insight into compensation trends.

news.headline: InventHelp inventor from Los Angeles, Calif., develops the AIR TIGHT SMELL PROOF HAMPER to keep odors inside.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 27, 2025, an inventor from Los Angeles, California, announced the creation of a new hamper designed to contain odors. The inventor shared, "I developed the AIR TIGHT SMELL PROOF HAMPER to address the issue of unpleasant odors escaping." The innovative design aims to keep smelly odors confined within the hamper, offering a solution to the problem of odors spreading.

news.headline: Generac wins multiple 2024 GOOD DESIGN Awards for innovative generator design. Based in WAUKESHA, Wis, the company is NYSE: GNRC-listed.
news.summary: Generac Holdings, Inc., a prominent player in the energy technology sector, recently received numerous awards for its generator portfolio. The company, based in Waukesha, Wisconsin, demonstrates a commitment to cutting-edge design and product engineering. These accolades highlight Generac's success in delivering innovative solutions to its customers. The recognition comes amidst its continued leadership in the industry.

news.headline: Crisp acquires Shelf Engine for AI demand planning in retail, aims to reduce food waste and improve inventory management.
news.summary: Bentonville, Arkansas-based company Crisp, a prominent retail data solutions provider, has recently purchased Shelf Engine, a pioneer in AI-driven demand forecasting and automated ordering systems. This acquisition aims to enhance Crisp's collaborative commerce platform by incorporating Shelf Engine's sophisticated algorithms. The integration will enable retailers to efficiently manage in-stock inventory, minimize food wastage, enhance shelf organization, and boost revenue in today's competitive retail landscape. Shelf Engine is known for its expertise in leveraging artificial intelligence for accurate demand predictions and automated ordering processes.

news.headline: ICE and Circle explore USDC integration, with $60 billion in circulation. They will assess USDC and USYC for various services.
news.summary: Intercontinental Exchange Inc. (NYSE:ICE), the parent company of the New York Stock Exchange, has entered into a memorandum of understanding with Circle (CRYPTO: USDC) to evaluate the potential use of Circle's USDC stablecoin and USYC tokenized yield product. The partnership, announced on Thursday, will involve joint efforts between ICE and Circle to assess the applicability of USDC, a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar and boasting a circulation exceeding $60 billion, in derivatives, clearing, and data services provided by ICE. Additionally, ICE is examining Circle's US Yield Coin (USYC), a tokenized offering aimed at generating yield from U.S. funds.

news.headline: BE OPEN Art launches Oceania competition for emerging artists to showcase their work; part of ongoing support initiative.
news.summary: LUGANO, Switzerland - The online gallery BE OPEN Art, established by Elena Baturina's humanitarian think-tank BE OPEN, has announced the continuation of BE OPEN Regional Art. This regional competition supports emerging artists whose work best embodies their region. The initiative aims to assist artists in showcasing their talents and has garnered significant attention since its inception.

news.headline: Marelli to exhibit 'Speed-to-Market' innovations at Auto Shanghai 2025, including Micro Laser Projector display.
news.summary: Marelli's exhibition at the event in Shanghai on March 27, 2025, highlights their commitment to quick innovation with Minimum Viable Products, like the Micro Laser Projector display. They also presented software-defined vehicle tools, modular platforms, and readily available technologies to assist car manufacturers in accelerating their time to market. These offerings embody Marelli's dedication to advancing the automotive industry.

news.headline: MSC Cruises receives MSC World America in France, plans future milestones with new ships MSC World Asia and unnamed fourth ship.
news.summary: MSC Cruises recently received their newest flagship, MSC World America, before its official naming ceremony at PortMiami's cutting-edge cruise terminal. Additionally, the company marked the coin ceremony for MSC World Asia and initiated the steel cutting for their fourth world-class vessel, also revealed as MSC [...].

news.headline: Bayswater in Denver sold DJ Basin assets to Prairie Operating Co for undisclosed cash and stock transaction.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, Bayswater Exploration and Production, located in Denver, completed the sale of specific assets in the Denver Julesburg Basin to Prairie Operating Co. This transaction, involving cash and stock, was valued at a significant sum.

news.headline: UDT marks 30 years, confirms commitment to Tennessee with investments in education technology. Celebrating nationwide growth.
news.summary: NASHVILLE--UDT (United Data Technologies), a prominent K-12 technology provider, has revealed substantial investments in Tennessee as part of its comprehensive plan to enhance internet, telecom, and managed services for schools nationwide. This announcement coincides with UDT commemorating its 30th anniversary this month. Originally established in a family home in 199__, the company has experienced rapid expansion, now standing as a national leader in the industry. This strategic initiative aims to bolster and make these critical services more accessible and cost-effective for schools.

news.headline: Takara Sake USA to renew partnership with New York Mets through 2028 season, after a four-year deal. CEO excited for future collaboration.
news.summary: Takara Sake USA Inc. (Takara) has extended its partnership with the New York Mets for four more years following their designation as the franchise's inaugural official sake sponsor in 2024. Kaoru Hasumi, Takara’s President and CEO, expressed excitement about the renewal, citing the Mets' previous successful and remarkable season. Takara remains enthusiastic about another fruitful year with the Mets ahead.
